LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS TRAINING, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL AND PILE DRIVERS LOCAL 34'S HEARING ON PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PETITIONER IS AWARDED ATTORNEY'S FEES OF $893.75 AND COSTS OF $522.21. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award; Index
Off Calendar Jul-10-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SARAH WRIGHT-SCHREIBERG OF WWEINBERG, ROGER & ROSENFELD, TEL. NO. (510) 337-1001 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS TRAINING, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL AND PILE DRIVERS LOCAL 34'S HEARING On Petition To Confirm ArbITRATION Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Petitioner is awarded attorney's fees of $893.75 and costs of $522.21. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. =(302/HEK)
